runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.66) in a Class 2/3, finishing a 5.5 lengths fourth. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Gets chance to atone.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 457m at Ascot Park beaten 2.25 lengths (26.25) behind Paw Zachary in a Class 4 on April 8. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Looks a strong winning hope.

runners.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 457m at Ascot Park. That followed a win two back in 25.54 beating Jilliby Finale over 457m at Manawatu. Meets a tougher field today.
